web.description: Configuration for the web-subscription management screen, consumed by WebSubscriptionManagementUseCaseImpl via WebSubscriptionManagementRepoImpl. The app reads this object when the user opens subscription management from a web-originated subscription. Removing or nullifying this object disables the web management feature entirely (isFeatureEnabled returns false).

on_hold.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — the WebSubscriptionManagementUseCaseImpl never reads onHoldScreen. Changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions. The on_hold object is only consumed by the mobile flow.

benefit_items.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

description.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

id.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

title.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

icon_name.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

screen_title.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

buttons.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

icon.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

action.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

style.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

text.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

benefit_items_title.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

description.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

title.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

pro.description: Screen configuration shown to Pro-tier subscribers in the web management flow. Selected when the user's tierType equals "pro". The screen uses SecondaryColors as its accent colour. If null, the entire management screen is not rendered for Pro users.

benefit_items.description: Array of subscription benefit items rendered in the benefits card section. Each item is displayed as a row with an icon, title, and description. Items with id "storage" or "credit" receive dynamic placeholder replacement in their titles.

description.description: Subtitle text displayed below the benefit item title in a lighter colour (TextColors.tint2). Accepts any free-form string. Changing it updates the secondary text shown beneath the bold benefit label in the benefits card.

id.description: Identifier used for special placeholder replacement in the title. Accepted values the code explicitly checks: "storage" (replaces %s in title with user's storage limit in GB) and "credit" (replaces %s in title with renewable credit limit). Any other value results in the title being displayed as-is.

title.description: Primary label displayed in bold next to the benefit icon. May contain a %s placeholder when id is "storage" (replaced with storage GB) or "credit" (replaced with credit count). Changing it updates the bold text in each benefit row.

icon_name.description: Drawable resource name resolved via Resources.getDrawableIdByName(). Rendered as a 24dp icon tinted with the screen accent colour. If the name does not resolve to a valid drawable, the entire benefit row is hidden.

screen_title.description: Main heading displayed at the top of the management screen, rendered as bold centred text (Typography.T9 BOLD). Accepts any free-form string. Changing it updates the large title visible above the payment card.

benefit_items_title.description: Section heading displayed above the list of benefit items in bold (Typography.T5 BOLD). Accepts any free-form string. Changing it updates the title text at the top of the benefits card.

packages.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — WebSubscriptionManagementUseCaseImpl does not read the packages field from the model. Changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

base_upgrade.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

replacement_mode.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

package_id.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

android_offer_id.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

upgrade.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

package_id.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

android_offer_id.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

subscription_state_info.description: Container for subscription-state-specific payment card data. The web flow selects either cancelled_state or subscribed_state based on the user's current subscription status. Provides the title, price text, billing date, trial info, description, and buttons for the payment info card.

pause_state.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — the web use case only checks cancelled_state and subscribed_state. Changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

free_trial_text_single_day.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

paid_price.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

free_trial_text.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

period.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

buttons.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

icon.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

action.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

style.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

text.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

description.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

title.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

next_billing_date.description: Not consumed in current source code for the web flow — changing it has no visible effect on web-managed subscriptions.

cancelled_state.description: Array of state info entries used when the user's subscription status is Canceled. The app selects the entry whose period matches the user's current subscription period. Provides the payment card content shown to cancelled subscribers.

free_trial_text_single_day.description: Template text shown when the user is on a free trial with exactly 1 day remaining. Must contain a %s placeholder which is replaced with "1". Changing it updates the single-day trial countdown text in the payment info section. Not shown for paid (non-trial) subscribers.

paid_price.description: Template text displaying the subscription price. Must contain a %s placeholder which is replaced with the currency symbol and price value (e.g. "$9.99"). Changing it updates the price line shown in the payment info section.

free_trial_text.description: Template text shown when the user is on a free trial with more than 1 day remaining. Must contain a %s placeholder which is replaced with the number of days left. Not shown for paid (non-trial) subscribers. Changing it updates the trial countdown text in the payment info section.

period.description: Identifies which subscription billing period this entry applies to, used to match against the user's current subscription period. Accepted values: "monthly" or "yearly". The app selects the first entry in the array whose period matches the user's subscription period.

buttons.description: List of action buttons rendered vertically in the payment card section. Each button is displayed as a PicsartButton with configurable text, icon, style, and click action. Changing the list alters the number and appearance of buttons below the subscription info.

icon.description: Drawable resource name resolved via Resources.getDrawableIdByName(), displayed as an end icon on the button. If the name does not resolve to a valid drawable, no icon is shown but the button remains visible. Changing it updates or removes the trailing icon on the button.

action.description: Determines button click behaviour. Accepted values: "cancel" (opens cancellation mini-app), "open_half_screen" (opens subscription management offer screen via hook), a URL containing the app base URL (opens in-app WebView), a URL containing the Play Store subscription hook (opens Play Store subscription page with package/SKU params), or any other hook URI (opened via HookUtils). An empty string causes no action.

style.description: Determines the visual style of the button. Accepted values: "fill" (renders as ButtonType.FILLED with solid accent colour) and "outline" (renders as ButtonType.OUTLINE with bordered style). Any other value results in no explicit button type being set.

text.description: Label displayed on the button. Accepts any free-form string. Changing it updates the visible text on the corresponding action button in the payment card.

description.description: Secondary text displayed below the subscription info divider in the payment card, rendered in medium weight (Typography.T4). Accepts any free-form string. Changing it updates the descriptive paragraph shown below the price and billing date lines.

title.description: Bold title text displayed at the top of the payment info card (Typography.T5 BOLD), alongside the premium badge. Accepts any free-form string. Changing it updates the header text shown above the subscription details.

next_billing_date.description: Template text for the next billing date, processed through calculateDate() using the subscription's expire date to format the actual date. Changing it updates the billing date line displayed in the payment info section.

subscribed_state.description: Array of state info entries used when the user is actively subscribed (not cancelled). The app selects the entry whose period matches the user's current subscription period. Provides the payment card content shown to active subscribers.

free_trial_text_single_day.description: Template text shown when the user is on a free trial with exactly 1 day remaining. Must contain a %s placeholder which is replaced with "1". Changing it updates the single-day trial countdown text in the payment info section. Not shown for paid (non-trial) subscribers.

paid_price.description: Template text displaying the subscription price. Must contain a %s placeholder which is replaced with the currency symbol and price value (e.g. "$9.99"). Changing it updates the price line shown in the payment info section.

free_trial_text.description: Template text shown when the user is on a free trial with more than 1 day remaining. Must contain a %s placeholder which is replaced with the number of days left. Not shown for paid (non-trial) subscribers. Changing it updates the trial countdown text in the payment info section.

period.description: Identifies which subscription billing period this entry applies to, used to match against the user's current subscription period. Accepted values: "monthly" or "yearly". The app selects the first entry in the array whose period matches the user's subscription period.

buttons.description: List of action buttons rendered vertically in the payment card section. Each button is displayed as a PicsartButton with configurable text, icon, style, and click action. Changing the list alters the number and appearance of buttons below the subscription info.

icon.description: Drawable resource name resolved via Resources.getDrawableIdByName(), displayed as an end icon on the button. If the name does not resolve to a valid drawable, no icon is shown but the button remains visible. Changing it updates or removes the trailing icon on the button.

action.description: Determines button click behaviour. Accepted values: "cancel" (opens cancellation mini-app), "open_half_screen" (opens subscription management offer screen via hook), a URL containing the app base URL (opens in-app WebView), a URL containing the Play Store subscription hook (opens Play Store subscription page with package/SKU params), or any other hook URI (opened via HookUtils). An empty string causes no action.

next_billing_date.description: Template text for the next billing date, processed through calculateDate() using the subscription's expire date to format the actual date. Changing it updates the billing date line displayed in the payment info section.

mobile.description: Configuration for the mobile subscription management screen, consumed by MobileSubscriptionManagementUseCaseImpl via MobileSubscriptionManagementRepoImpl. The app reads this object when the user opens subscription management from the mobile-native flow. Removing or nullifying this object disables the mobile management feature entirely (isFeatureEnabled returns false).

on_hold.description: Screen configuration shown when the user's subscription status is OnHold. Used by MobileSubscriptionManagementUseCaseImpl to build the on-hold management screen with SecondaryColors accent and a lotus gradient background image. If null, the management screen returns null and is not displayed for on-hold users.

benefit_items.description: Array of subscription benefit items rendered in the benefits card section of the on-hold screen. Each item is displayed as a row with an icon, title, and description. Items with id "storage" or "credit" receive dynamic placeholder replacement in their titles.

description.description: Subtitle text displayed below the benefit item title in a lighter colour (TextColors.tint2). Accepts any free-form string. Changing it updates the secondary text shown beneath the bold benefit label in the benefits card.

id.description: Identifier used for special placeholder replacement in the title. Accepted values the code explicitly checks: "storage" (replaces %s in title with user's storage limit in GB) and "credit" (replaces %s in title with renewable credit limit). Any other value results in the title being displayed as-is.

title.description: Primary label displayed in bold next to the benefit icon. May contain a %s placeholder when id is "storage" (replaced with storage GB) or "credit" (replaced with credit count). Changing it updates the bold text in each benefit row.

icon_name.description: Drawable resource name resolved via Resources.getDrawableIdByName(). Rendered as a 24dp icon tinted with the screen accent colour. If the name does not resolve to a valid drawable, the entire benefit row is hidden.

screen_title.description: Main heading displayed at the top of the on-hold management screen, rendered as bold centred text (Typography.T9 BOLD). Accepts any free-form string. Changing it updates the large title visible above the payment card.

buttons.description: List of action buttons rendered vertically in the payment card section of the on-hold screen. Each button is displayed as a PicsartButton with configurable text, icon, style, and click action. Changing the list alters the number and appearance of buttons shown to on-hold users.

icon.description: Drawable resource name resolved via Resources.getDrawableIdByName(), displayed as an end icon on the button. If the name does not resolve to a valid drawable, no icon is shown but the button remains visible. Changing it updates or removes the trailing icon on the button.

action.description: Determines button click behaviour. Accepted values: "cancel" (opens cancellation mini-app), "open_half_screen" (opens subscription management offer screen via hook), a URL containing the app base URL (opens in-app WebView), a URL containing the Play Store subscription hook (opens Play Store subscription page with package/SKU params), or any other hook URI (opened via HookUtils). An empty string causes no action.

style.description: Determines the visual style of the button. Accepted values: "fill" (renders as ButtonType.FILLED with solid accent colour) and "outline" (renders as ButtonType.OUTLINE with bordered style). Any other value results in no explicit button type being set.

text.description: Label displayed on the button. Accepts any free-form string. Changing it updates the visible text on the corresponding action button in the payment card.

benefit_items_title.description: Section heading displayed above the list of benefit items in bold (Typography.T5 BOLD) on the on-hold screen. Accepts any free-form string. Changing it updates the title text at the top of the benefits card.

description.description: Secondary text displayed below the subscription info divider in the on-hold payment card, rendered in medium weight (Typography.T4). Accepts any free-form string. Changing it updates the descriptive paragraph shown to on-hold users below the title.

title.description: Bold title text displayed at the top of the on-hold payment info card (Typography.T5 BOLD), alongside the premium badge. Accepts any free-form string. Changing it updates the header text shown above the subscription details for on-hold users.

pro.description: Screen configuration shown to Pro-tier subscribers in the mobile management flow. Selected when the user's tierType equals "pro". The screen uses SecondaryColors as its accent colour. If null, the entire management screen is not rendered for Pro users.

benefit_items.description: Array of subscription benefit items rendered in the benefits card section. Each item is displayed as a row with an icon, title, and description. Items with id "storage" or "credit" receive dynamic placeholder replacement in their titles.

description.description: Subtitle text displayed below the benefit item title in a lighter colour (TextColors.tint2). Accepts any free-form string. Changing it updates the secondary text shown beneath the bold benefit label in the benefits card.

id.description: Identifier used for special placeholder replacement in the title. Accepted values the code explicitly checks: "storage" (replaces %s in title with user's storage limit in GB) and "credit" (replaces %s in title with renewable credit limit). Any other value results in the title being displayed as-is.

title.description: Primary label displayed in bold next to the benefit icon. May contain a %s placeholder when id is "storage" (replaced with storage GB) or "credit" (replaced with credit count). Changing it updates the bold text in each benefit row.

icon_name.description: Drawable resource name resolved via Resources.getDrawableIdByName(). Rendered as a 24dp icon tinted with the screen accent colour. If the name does not resolve to a valid drawable, the entire benefit row is hidden.

screen_title.description: Main heading displayed at the top of the management screen, rendered as bold centred text (Typography.T9 BOLD). Accepts any free-form string. Changing it updates the large title visible above the payment card.

benefit_items_title.description: Section heading displayed above the list of benefit items in bold (Typography.T5 BOLD). Accepts any free-form string. Changing it updates the title text at the top of the benefits card.

packages.description: Container for upgrade and incentive package definitions used in the mobile cancellation mini-app flow. Provides the base upgrade package and promotional incentive offers. The entire object is passed to SubscriptionCancellationMiniAppActivity when the user taps a cancel button.

base_upgrade.description: Defines the standard upgrade package offered to the user. Its package_id and android_offer_id are used to look up pricing and free-trial details from Google Play via SubscriptionPackageDetailsUseCase. Changing this alters the base upgrade option shown in the cancellation mini-app.

replacement_mode.description: Controls how the current subscription plan is replaced when the user upgrades. Parsed via PlanReplacementMode.parseToReplacementMode(). Accepted values correspond to Google Play BillingClient replacement modes: integers or names mapping to UNKNOWN_SUBSCRIPTION_UPGRADE_DOWNGRADE_POLICY (0), IMMEDIATE_WITH_TIME_PRORATION (1), IMMEDIATE_AND_CHARGE_PRORATED_PRICE (2), IMMEDIATE_WITHOUT_PRORATION (3), DEFERRED (4), IMMEDIATE_AND_CHARGE_FULL_PRICE (5). Changing it affects the proration behaviour during a plan switch.

package_id.description: Google Play subscription product ID for the base upgrade package. Used to query package details (price, period, currency) via SubscriptionPackageDetailsUseCase.getPackageDetail(). Changing it points the upgrade flow to a different Play Store product.

android_offer_id.description: Google Play offer ID for the base upgrade package, used with package_id to look up promotional pricing and free-trial period via getPromotionalPackagePrices(). Changing it alters the specific offer (e.g. free trial duration) presented during upgrade.

incentives.description: Container for promotional incentive packages offered during the cancellation flow. Contains an upgrade incentive (higher-tier promotional offer) and a discount incentive (reduced-price offer on the current plan). Both are used to calculate and display promotional pricing in the cancellation mini-app.

upgrade.description: Defines the promotional upgrade incentive package. Its package_id and android_offer_id are used to fetch promotional pricing (main price, first billing period) via getPromotionalPackagePrices(). Changing this alters the upgrade incentive offer shown in the cancellation mini-app.

replacement_mode.description: Controls how the current subscription plan is replaced when the user accepts the upgrade incentive. Parsed via PlanReplacementMode.parseToReplacementMode(). Accepted values: integers or names mapping to UNKNOWN_SUBSCRIPTION_UPGRADE_DOWNGRADE_POLICY (0), IMMEDIATE_WITH_TIME_PRORATION (1), IMMEDIATE_AND_CHARGE_PRORATED_PRICE (2), IMMEDIATE_WITHOUT_PRORATION (3), DEFERRED (4), IMMEDIATE_AND_CHARGE_FULL_PRICE (5). Changing it affects the proration behaviour during the incentive upgrade.

package_id.description: Google Play subscription product ID for the upgrade incentive. Used with android_offer_id to fetch promotional pricing via getPromotionalPackagePrices(). Changing it points the upgrade incentive to a different Play Store product.

android_offer_id.description: Google Play offer ID for the upgrade incentive, used to look up the promotional offer's main price and first billing period. Changing it alters the specific promotional pricing displayed for the upgrade incentive.

discount.description: Defines the discount incentive package offered to retain the user. If package_id is empty or null, the user's current active package ID is used instead. The android_offer_id is used to fetch the discounted promotional price and calculate the discount percentage. Changing this alters the discount offer shown in the cancellation mini-app.

replacement_mode.description: Controls how the current subscription plan is replaced when the user accepts the discount incentive. Parsed via PlanReplacementMode.parseToReplacementMode(). Accepted values: integers or names mapping to UNKNOWN_SUBSCRIPTION_UPGRADE_DOWNGRADE_POLICY (0), IMMEDIATE_WITH_TIME_PRORATION (1), IMMEDIATE_AND_CHARGE_PRORATED_PRICE (2), IMMEDIATE_WITHOUT_PRORATION (3), DEFERRED (4), IMMEDIATE_AND_CHARGE_FULL_PRICE (5). Changing it affects the proration behaviour during the discount acceptance.

package_id.description: Google Play subscription product ID for the discount incentive. If empty or null, the user's current active subscription package ID is used as a fallback. Changing it points the discount offer to a different Play Store product.

android_offer_id.description: Google Play offer ID for the discount incentive, used to fetch the discounted price via getPromotionalPackagePrices(). The discount percentage is calculated from the difference between mainPriceMicros and firstPriceMicros of this offer. Changing it alters the discount amount and pricing displayed.

subscription_state_info.description: Container for subscription-state-specific payment card data. The mobile flow selects grace_state, cancelled_state, pause_state, or subscribed_state based on the user's SubscriptionStatus. Provides the title, price text, billing date, trial info, description, and buttons for the payment info card.

pause_state.description: Array of state info entries used when the user's subscription status is Paused. The app selects the entry whose period matches the user's current subscription period (via parsePeriod). Provides the payment card content shown to paused subscribers.

free_trial_text_single_day.description: Template text shown when the user is on a free trial with exactly 1 day remaining. Must contain a %s placeholder which is replaced with "1". Changing it updates the single-day trial countdown text in the payment info section. Not shown for paid (non-trial) subscribers.

paid_price.description: Template text displaying the subscription price. Must contain a %s placeholder which is replaced with the formatted price from the user's package details (e.g. "$9.99/mo"). Changing it updates the price line shown in the payment info section.

free_trial_text.description: Template text shown when the user is on a free trial with more than 1 day remaining. Must contain a %s placeholder which is replaced with the number of days left. Not shown for paid (non-trial) subscribers. Changing it updates the trial countdown text in the payment info section.

period.description: Identifies which subscription billing period this entry applies to, used to match against the user's current subscription period via parsePeriod(). Accepted values: "monthly" or "yearly". The app selects the first entry in the array whose period matches.

buttons.description: List of action buttons rendered vertically in the payment card section. Each button is displayed as a PicsartButton with configurable text, icon, style, and click action. Changing the list alters the number and appearance of buttons below the subscription info.

icon.description: Drawable resource name resolved via Resources.getDrawableIdByName(), displayed as an end icon on the button. If the name does not resolve to a valid drawable, no icon is shown but the button remains visible. Changing it updates or removes the trailing icon on the button.

action.description: Determines button click behaviour. Accepted values: "cancel" (opens cancellation mini-app), "open_half_screen" (opens subscription management offer screen via hook), a URL containing the app base URL (opens in-app WebView), a URL containing the Play Store subscription hook (opens Play Store subscription page with package/SKU params), or any other hook URI (opened via HookUtils). An empty string causes no action.

style.description: Determines the visual style of the button. Accepted values: "fill" (renders as ButtonType.FILLED with solid accent colour) and "outline" (renders as ButtonType.OUTLINE with bordered style). Any other value results in no explicit button type being set.

text.description: Label displayed on the button. Accepts any free-form string. Changing it updates the visible text on the corresponding action button in the payment card.

description.description: Secondary text displayed below the subscription info divider in the payment card, rendered in medium weight (Typography.T4). Accepts any free-form string. Changing it updates the descriptive paragraph shown below the price and billing date lines.

title.description: Bold title text displayed at the top of the payment info card (Typography.T5 BOLD), alongside the premium badge. Accepts any free-form string. Changing it updates the header text shown above the subscription details.

next_billing_date.description: Template text for the next billing date, processed through calculateDate() using the subscription's expire date to format the actual date. Changing it updates the billing date line displayed in the payment info section.

cancelled_state.description: Array of state info entries used when the user's subscription status is Canceled. The app selects the entry whose period matches the user's current subscription period (via parsePeriod). Provides the payment card content shown to cancelled subscribers.

free_trial_text_single_day.description: Template text shown when the user is on a free trial with exactly 1 day remaining. Must contain a %s placeholder which is replaced with "1". Changing it updates the single-day trial countdown text in the payment info section. Not shown for paid (non-trial) subscribers.

paid_price.description: Template text displaying the subscription price. Must contain a %s placeholder which is replaced with the formatted price from the user's package details (e.g. "$9.99/mo"). Changing it updates the price line shown in the payment info section.

free_trial_text.description: Template text shown when the user is on a free trial with more than 1 day remaining. Must contain a %s placeholder which is replaced with the number of days left. Not shown for paid (non-trial) subscribers. Changing it updates the trial countdown text in the payment info section.

next_billing_date.description: Template text for the next billing date, processed through calculateDate() using the subscription's expire date to format the actual date. Changing it updates the billing date line displayed in the payment info section.

subscribed_state.description: Array of state info entries used when the user is actively subscribed (status is not Canceled, InGrace, Paused, or OnHold). The app selects the entry whose period matches the user's current subscription period (via parsePeriod). Provides the payment card content shown to active subscribers.

free_trial_text_single_day.description: Template text shown when the user is on a free trial with exactly 1 day remaining. Must contain a %s placeholder which is replaced with "1". Changing it updates the single-day trial countdown text in the payment info section. Not shown for paid (non-trial) subscribers.

plus.description: Screen configuration shown to Plus-tier subscribers in the mobile management flow. Selected when the user's tierType equals "plus". The screen uses PrimaryColors as its accent colour. If null, the entire management screen is not rendered for Plus users.

benefit_items.description: Array of subscription benefit items rendered in the benefits card section. Each item is displayed as a row with an icon, title, and description. Items with id "storage" or "credit" receive dynamic placeholder replacement in their titles.

period.description: Identifies which subscription billing period this entry applies to, used to match against the user's current subscription period via parsePeriod(). Accepted values: "monthly" or "yearly". The app selects the first entry in the array whose period matches.

buttons.description: List of action buttons rendered vertically in the payment card section. Each button is displayed as a PicsartButton with configurable text, icon, style, and click action. Changing the list alters the number and appearance of buttons below the subscription info.

icon.description: Drawable resource name resolved via Resources.getDrawableIdByName(), displayed as an end icon on the button. If the name does not resolve to a valid drawable, no icon is shown but the button remains visible. Changing it updates or removes the trailing icon on the button.

action.description: Determines button click behaviour. Accepted values: "cancel" (opens cancellation mini-app), "open_half_screen" (opens subscription management offer screen via hook), a URL containing the app base URL (opens in-app WebView), a URL containing the Play Store subscription hook (opens Play Store subscription page with package/SKU params), or any other hook URI (opened via HookUtils). An empty string causes no action.

style.description: Determines the visual style of the button. Accepted values: "fill" (renders as ButtonType.FILLED with solid accent colour) and "outline" (renders as ButtonType.OUTLINE with bordered style). Any other value results in no explicit button type being set.

text.description: Label displayed on the button. Accepts any free-form string. Changing it updates the visible text on the corresponding action button in the payment card.

description.description: Secondary text displayed below the subscription info divider in the payment card, rendered in medium weight (Typography.T4). Accepts any free-form string. Changing it updates the descriptive paragraph shown below the price and billing date lines.

title.description: Bold title text displayed at the top of the payment info card (Typography.T5 BOLD), alongside the premium badge. Accepts any free-form string. Changing it updates the header text shown above the subscription details.

next_billing_date.description: Template text for the next billing date, processed through calculateDate() using the subscription's expire date to format the actual date. Changing it updates the billing date line displayed in the payment info section.

subscribed_state.description: Array of state info entries used when the user is actively subscribed (status is not Canceled, InGrace, Paused, or OnHold). The app selects the entry whose period matches the user's current subscription period (via parsePeriod). Provides the payment card content shown to active subscribers.

free_trial_text_single_day.description: Template text shown when the user is on a free trial with exactly 1 day remaining. Must contain a %s placeholder which is replaced with "1". Changing it updates the single-day trial countdown text in the payment info section. Not shown for paid (non-trial) subscribers.

paid_price.description: Template text displaying the subscription price. Must contain a %s placeholder which is replaced with the formatted price from the user's package details (e.g. "$9.99/mo"). Changing it updates the price line shown in the payment info section.

free_trial_text.description: Template text shown when the user is on a free trial with more than 1 day remaining. Must contain a %s placeholder which is replaced with the number of days left. Not shown for paid (non-trial) subscribers. Changing it updates the trial countdown text in the payment info section.

period.description: Identifies which subscription billing period this entry applies to, used to match against the user's current subscription period via parsePeriod(). Accepted values: "monthly" or "yearly". The app selects the first entry in the array whose period matches.

buttons.description: List of action buttons rendered vertically in the payment card section. Each button is displayed as a PicsartButton with configurable text, icon, style, and click action. Changing the list alters the number and appearance of buttons below the subscription info.

icon.description: Drawable resource name resolved via Resources.getDrawableIdByName(), displayed as an end icon on the button. If the name does not resolve to a valid drawable, no icon is shown but the button remains visible. Changing it updates or removes the trailing icon on the button.

action.description: Determines button click behaviour. Accepted values: "cancel" (opens cancellation mini-app), "open_half_screen" (opens subscription management offer screen via hook), a URL containing the app base URL (opens in-app WebView), a URL containing the Play Store subscription hook (opens Play Store subscription page with package/SKU params), or any other hook URI (opened via HookUtils). An empty string causes no action.

style.description: Determines the visual style of the button. Accepted values: "fill" (renders as ButtonType.FILLED with solid accent colour) and "outline" (renders as ButtonType.OUTLINE with bordered style). Any other value results in no explicit button type being set.

text.description: Label displayed on the button. Accepts any free-form string. Changing it updates the visible text on the corresponding action button in the payment card.

description.description: Secondary text displayed below the subscription info divider in the payment card, rendered in medium weight (Typography.T4). Accepts any free-form string. Changing it updates the descriptive paragraph shown below the price and billing date lines.

title.description: Bold title text displayed at the top of the payment info card (Typography.T5 BOLD), alongside the premium badge. Accepts any free-form string. Changing it updates the header text shown above the subscription details.

next_billing_date.description: Template text for the next billing date, processed through calculateDate() using the subscription's expire date to format the actual date. Changing it updates the billing date line displayed in the payment info section.

grace_state.description: Array of state info entries used when the user's subscription status is InGrace. The app selects the entry whose period matches the user's current subscription period (via parsePeriod). Provides the payment card content shown to subscribers in the grace period.

free_trial_text_single_day.description: Template text shown when the user is on a free trial with exactly 1 day remaining. Must contain a %s placeholder which is replaced with "1". Changing it updates the single-day trial countdown text in the payment info section. Not shown for paid (non-trial) subscribers.

paid_price.description: Template text displaying the subscription price. Must contain a %s placeholder which is replaced with the formatted price from the user's package details (e.g. "$9.99/mo"). Changing it updates the price line shown in the payment info section.

free_trial_text.description: Template text shown when the user is on a free trial with more than 1 day remaining. Must contain a %s placeholder which is replaced with the number of days left. Not shown for paid (non-trial) subscribers. Changing it updates the trial countdown text in the payment info section.

icon.description: Drawable resource name resolved via Resources.getDrawableIdByName(), displayed as an end icon on the button. If the name does not resolve to a valid drawable, no icon is shown but the button remains visible. Changing it updates or removes the trailing icon on the button.

Accepted values: "cancel" (opens cancellation mini-app), "open_half_screen" (opens subscription management offer screen via hook), a URL containing the app base URL (opens in-app WebView), a URL containing the Play Store subscription hook (opens Play Store subscription page with package/SKU params), or any other hook URI (opened via HookUtils). An empty string causes no action.

tree.role: @FeatureEnd entry point for web and mobile subscription management screen with Compose UI

children.role: Orchestrates web and mobile management use cases and exposes screen state to the UI
Interface defining contract for fetching management screen data, payment info, and analytics
Implements web management by mapping remote config and subscription state into UI entities
Interface for accessing web subscription management remote config and price API
Fetches SubscriptionManagementScreenModel from RemoteSettings and price info from WebSubscriptionPriceApi
@FeatureStart terminal data model deserialized from the web_subscription_management remote settings key
Implements mobile management with Play Store package details and promotion offer resolution
Fetches mobile subscription management config from RemoteSettings using the same SubscriptionManagementScreenModel
@FeatureStart terminal data model deserialized from the web_subscription_management remote settings key
Handles monetization analytics tracking for screen open and button click events
Interface providing premium badge resources for subscription tier display in the UI
Interface for launching a web view to handle subscription management URLs
Delegates web view opening to WebViewLauncher
